title: Regeneron's fianlimab/Libtayo combo fails to beat Merck's Keytruda in Phase 3 ad
headline: Regeneron's fianlimab/Libtayo combo fails to beat Merck's Keytruda in Phase 3 advanced melanoma trial, wiping out billions in market value.
key_facts: - Phase 3 trial of fianlimab (LAG-3 inhibitor) + Libtayo (cemiplimab, PD-1) vs. Keytruda (pembrolizumab) monotherapy in advanced melanoma. - Trial missed its primary endpoint: no statistically significant improvement in progression-free survival (PFS). Researcher notes cite PFS of 11.5 months (combo

title: FDA approves AstraZeneca's Baxfendy, a first-in-class aldosterone synthase inhib
headline: FDA approves AstraZeneca's Baxfendy, a first-in-class aldosterone synthase inhibitor for hypertension.
key_facts: - Drug name: Baxfendy (baxdrostat). First-in-class aldosterone synthase inhibitor. - FiercePharma (May 18, 11:23am): "AZ nets key hypertension nod for Baxfendy, plus new Fasenra use" — indicating a dual approval day (Fasenra also received a new use expansion). - BioPharma Dive lists this as a top st

title: Merck's antibody-drug conjugate sac-TMT (licensed from China's Kelun-Biotech) hi
headline: Merck's antibody-drug conjugate sac-TMT (licensed from China's Kelun-Biotech) hits primary endpoint in its first global Phase 3 trial, ahead of schedule.
key_facts: - Drug: sac-TMT (sacituzumab-TMT), an ADC licensed from Kelun-Biotech (China). - Indication: endometrial cancer. - FiercePharma (May 18, 11:21am): "In endometrial cancer, Merck and Kelun score with sac-TMT."

title: The U.S. Supreme Court refuses to take up legal challenges to the Inflation Redu
headline: The U.S. Supreme Court refuses to take up legal challenges to the Inflation Reduction Act's drug price negotiation provisions, brought by six pharmaceutical companies.
key_facts: - 6 pharma companies challenged IRA provisions (specific company names not in retrieved text). - Supreme Court declined to hear the cases — reported May 18, 2026. - FiercePharma (3:06pm), Endpoints News (8 hours before fetch), BioPharma Dive all cover.

title: Amgen stands by Tavneos (avacopan) after reports of 20 deaths in Japan.
headline: Amgen stands by Tavneos (avacopan) after reports of 20 deaths in Japan.
key_facts: - Drug: Tavneos (avacopan), an Amgen drug. - 20 deaths reported in Japan (per BioPharma Dive news roundup headline and Endpoints News). - Endpoints (May 18): "Amgen stands by Tavneos, despite reports of 20 deaths in Japan."

title: FDA CDER head Sara Høeg was fired — not voluntarily departed — in the latest FDA
headline: FDA CDER head Sara Høeg was fired — not voluntarily departed — in the latest FDA leadership shakeup, per her own confirmation on X.
key_facts: - Høeg confirmed on X (formerly Twitter): "I was fired." - Michael Davis replaces her at CDER. - This is a MATERIAL CORRECTION to Friday's episode, which framed it as an expected departure.
